description: Maps an ERP trigger to the Wave status this app should push via changeorderstatus.

fields.description: ERP lifecycle event that fires this outbound push.
fields.label: ERP Trigger
fields.options:
sales_order_submitted
sales_order_cancelled
pick_list_draft
pick_list_submitted
delivery_note_submitted
sales_invoice_submitted
payment_entry_submitted_partial
payment_entry_submitted_full

fields.description: Status string sent to Wave's changeorderstatus endpoint. Chosen from the Wave Status catalogue.
fields.label: Wave Status

fields.description: Optional human-readable reason, shown in the rules grid.
fields.label: Notes

name: Wave Status Rule Outbound
